'''zhashutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacuolarisation|vacuolarisation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacuolarisation|vacuolarisation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhashutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæshitith|zhæshitith]] || [[word:zhæshitij|zhæshitij]] || [[word:zhæshitish|zhæshitish]] || [[word:zhæshiti|zhæshiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhashushututh|zhashushututh]] || [[word:zhashushutuj|zhashushutuj]] || [[word:zhashushutush|zhashushutush]] || [[word:zhashushutu|zhashushutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhashututh|zhashututh]] || [[word:zhashutuj|zhashutuj]] || [[word:zhashutush|zhashutush]] || [[word:zhashutu|zhashutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhashuftuth|zhashuftuth]] || [[word:zhashuftuj|zhashuftuj]] || [[word:zhashuftush|zhashuftush]] || [[word:zhashuftuf|zhashuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhashututhu|zhashututhu]] || [[word:zhashutuju|zhashutuju]] || [[word:zhashutushu|zhashutushu]] || [[word:zhashutuku|zhashutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhashututh|zhashututh]] || [[word:zhashutuj|zhashutuj]] || [[word:zhashutush|zhashutush]] || [[word:zhashutu|zhashutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhashututhul|zhashututhul]] || [[word:zhashutujul|zhashutujul]] || [[word:zhashutushul|zhashutushul]] || [[word:zhashutukul|zhashutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhashututhuthu|zhashututhuthu]] || [[word:zhashutujuju|zhashutujuju]] || [[word:zhashutushushu|zhashutushushu]] || [[word:zhashutuku|zhashutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhashututhun|zhashututhun]] || [[word:zhashutujun|zhashutujun]] || [[word:zhashutushun|zhashutushun]] || [[word:zhashutukun|zhashutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhashututhuoro|zhashututhuoro]] || [[word:zhashutujuoro|zhashutujuoro]] || [[word:zhashutushuoro|zhashutushuoro]] || [[word:zhashutukuoro|zhashutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
